warnings: IMPORTANT: this sheet RESOLVES the dummy-grid extension discrepancy flagged repeatedly on structural sheets S-04 (~2.05m south of grid A), S-05 (~0.40m), and S-06 (~0.70m+0.50m) -- the area south of grid A is confirmed here to be 'จอดรถ' (parking/carport), a single-story open structure referenced to grade level '±0.00', with 'เฉลียง' (terrace) and 'ทางเดิน' (walkway) as transitional zones between it and the main house. This is fully consistent with a carport having its own independent (and non-matching) beam/slab-edge dimensions at each different structural drawing level, since it's not part of the main 2-story volume -- the differing dimensions across S-04/S-05/S-06 most likely reflect different measured features (e.g. roof overhang vs. slab edge vs. beam centerline) of this same carport structure rather than a contradiction. Still recommend a final human check against the architecture ground-floor plan (หน้า06) for the carport's exact footprint dimensions.

This mechanical ventilation-placement sheet (M-01/M-02) is advisory/recommended fan placement, not a structural or electrical circuit drawing -- consistent with houses #3/#4's equivalent M-series sheets.
